name: Hangzhou Shenhao Technology Co.,LTD.
summary: Hangzhou Shenhao Technology Co.,LTD. engages in research and development of artificial intelligence, data monitoring, smart grid, and other industrial health-related technology products. The company offers wheeled intelligent inspection robots, health guardian robots, disinfection robots, and smart helmet systems. Its products are used for patrol inspection and online monitoring of industrial equipment. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
